scripts.build:wasm: cargo build --target wasm32-unknown-unknown -p nes-wasm && wasm-bindgen --out-dir pkg --target web ../target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/debug/nes_wasm.wasm
scripts.build:wasm:release: cargo build --release --target wasm32-unknown-unknown -p nes-wasm && wasm-bindgen --out-dir pkg --target web ../target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/nes_wasm.wasm && wasm-opt -O3 pkg/nes_wasm_bg.wasm -o pkg/nes_wasm_bg.wasm
